What We Do

Our Services

A full-service commercial real estate platform built for Michigan’s most demanding owners, tenants, and investors.

Capabilities

A Complete CRE Platform

From acquisition strategy to lease negotiations, disposition advisory to market analysis — we cover every facet of commercial real estate across all of Michigan.

01
Office Leasing & Sales

Strategic tenant and landlord representation for Class A, B, and C office properties across Detroit, Troy, Southfield, Ann Arbor, and Grand Rapids.

02
Industrial & Logistics

Site selection, build-to-suit, and leasing services for warehousing, distribution, manufacturing, and last-mile logistics facilities statewide.

03
Investment Sales

Acquisition and disposition advisory for institutional-grade assets — NNN retail, multifamily, industrial, and mixed-use properties across Michigan.

04
Retail Leasing

End-to-end representation for national tenants, local operators, and landlords seeking optimal positioning in Michigan’s top retail corridors.

05
Portfolio & Asset Strategy

Comprehensive portfolio reviews, market positioning analyses, and hold/sell/refinance recommendations tailored to each client’s investment thesis.

06
Market Valuation & Advisory

Accurate, data-driven property valuations and market analyses for commercial assets — essential for acquisition underwriting, refinancing, and disposition planning.

Let’s Discuss Your Objectives

Our team is active across Michigan and ready to move quickly on your behalf.
